battleTraits.name: Beast of the Dark Jungles
battleTraits.declare: Pick your general to use this ability if they are in combat.
battleTraits.effect:
Pick 1 of the following:
- Gargantuan Jaws: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general and roll a dice. If the roll exceeds that unit’s Health characteristic, 1 model in that unit is slain.
- Roar: Pick an enemy unit in combat with your general. Subtract D6 from that unit’s control score this turn.

enhancements.name: Ancient Strategist
enhancements.timing: Once Per Battle, Enemy Movement Phase
enhancements.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of your general. You cannot pick your general.
enhancements.effect: That unit can use the 'Normal Move' ability as if it were your movement phase.

enhancements.name: Blade of Realities
enhancements.effect: Add 1 to the Rend characteristic of your general’s Relic Celestite Weapon.

enhancements.name: Sotek's Gaze
enhancements.effect: Roll a dice. Add the roll to your general’s control score this turn.

enhancements.name: The Wrath of Chotec
enhancements.effect: The Attacks characteristic of your general’s Sunbolt Gauntlet is 6 instead of D6.

regimentAbilities.name: Predatory Fighters
regimentAbilities.timing: Once Per Phase, End of Any Turn
regimentAbilities.declare: Roll a dice for each enemy unit in combat with any friendly units.
regimentAbilities.effect: On a 3+, inflict 1 mortal damage on the unit being rolled for.

regimentAbilities.name: Temple-City Guardians
regimentAbilities.effect: Friendly units have WARD (6+) while they are wholly within friendly territory.

abilities.name: Ancient Warlord
abilities.declare: Pick a friendly unit wholly within 12" of this unit to be the target. You cannot pick this unit.
abilities.effect: Until the start of your next turn, add 1 to charge rolls for the target.

abilities.name: Battle Damaged
abilities.effect: While this unit has 10 or more damage points, the Attacks characteristic of its Carnosaur's Massive Jaws is 1.

abilities.name: Ordered Cohorts
abilities.effect: Add 1 to save rolls for this unit while it is contesting an objective you control.

abilities.name: Brutal Blows
abilities.effect: This unit’s melee weapons have Crit (2 Hits) if the target unit has 5 or more models.
